revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23993722414|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Itsukushima shrine (Kushiro)]][[fr:Itsukushima-jinja (Kushiro)]][[ja:厳島神社 (釧路市)]]
{{Infobox religious building|image=File:厳島神社(釧路市).jpg|prefecture={{ill|Kushiro|qid=Q271917|1=Kushiro}}|coordinates={{Coord|42.97194444|N|144.37194444|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}

{{Short description|Shinto shrine in Japan}}
[[File:厳島神社(釧路市).jpg|thumb|]]

{{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}}{{nihongo|'''Itsukushima Jinja'''|厳島神社}} is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} in [[:en:Kushiro, Hokkaidō|Kushiro]], [[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]], {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. It was founded at the beginning of the nineteenth century.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/public_html/data/15/15001.html |title=Itsukushima Jinja |publisher=Hokkaidō Jinja-chō |accessdate=22 April 2011 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120324005821/http://www.hokkaidojinjacho.jp/public_html/data/15/15001.html |archive-date=24 March 2012 |url-status=dead }}</ref> A statue of [[:en:Yakushi|Yakushi]] or [[Kannon]] by {{ill|Enkū|en|Enkū|qid=Q2406940|lt=Enkū|1=Enkū}} has been designated a Prefectural Cultural Property.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.dokyoi.pref.hokkaido.lg.jp/file.jsp?id=262530 |title=円空作仏像 薬師像 |publisher=[[:en:Hokkaidō|Hokkaidō]] |accessdate=22 April 2011 }}{{Dead link|date=February 2023 |bot=InternetArchiveBot |fix-attempted=yes }}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://www17.plala.or.jp/omiya-946/keidai.html |title=Itsukushima Jinja |publisher=Itsukushima Jinja |accessdate=22 April 2011}}</ref>

==See also==
* [[Itsukushima Shrine|Itsukushima Jinja]]
* {{ill|Enkū|en|Enkū|qid=Q2406940|lt=Enkū|1=Enkū}}
* [[List of Shinto shrines in Japan#Hokkaid.C5.8D|List of Shinto shrines in Hokkaidō]]

{{Reflist}}

==External links==
